titleStmt.title: SII 4.1169: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 1169. (A.R. No. 298 of 1893). IN THE SAME PLACE.

encodingDesc.p: Encoded in TEI/EpiDoc according to the DHARMA Encoding Guide for Documentary Editions, version 2

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
maṁddāruṇḍu śrīramanu nāmaṇḍu jagatini Āmaṁtri
maṇi rājēṁdracōḍaja vanniyuṁ baḍasenu tadavarajuṇḍu bāndhavanidhānuṇḍu mānadhanuṇḍu sūrihṛdvadanasa
divākaruṇḍujvalakīrtticaṁdramāsadamalasarvvadigmukhuṇḍu jaṁgamakalpamahīruvāṁbu bhūviditamahānubhāvuṇḍu vavitracaritruṇḍu vātruṇḍikṣitini Ø 1 śrīmadrā
ghavanṛpatiki saumitriyu dharmmajunaku śakrātmajuṇḍunu rāmunaku hariyuṁ bōluga vatruṇḍagrajunaku nāptuṇḍayyenu [. 2*] vāsavasannibhuṇḍagu divākararājunakuṁ bulō
makanyāsamaśīlayai negaḍu nāyamasāniki nudbhaviṁcche gaṁggāsalilēśahāsaśaśikāśavi kāsapayōjakīrttikāṁttāsahituṁḍu dīprakaradhāmasudhāmuṇḍu sōmuṇḍunnatini Ø 3
bhīmabaluṇḍunu narccitabhīmēsvaruṇḍa�na vīrapermmāḍinṛpagrāmaṇiṁ golci divākarusōmaṇḍuviśvāsiyayyesūnṛtamahimanu [. 4*] viśvāsisōmanāryyaṇḍuviśvaṁbharayaṁddu
negaḍe viśrutamahimanu śāśvatakīrtti dayāmati nīśvarapadabhakti nadhipahitanayaśaktini Ø 5 sucirayaśōvilāsuṇḍagu sōmunakuṁ kulapālīkāśirōvicakilapuṣpadāmamagu ve
nnamakuṁ brabhaviṁcce bhāratīkucataṭatārahāruṇḍanaghuṇḍalaghuṇḍu vinirggalatsudhāvacanaṇḍu dharmmalōluṇḍu divākaruṇḍilapai sudhākaruṇḍilanu Ø 6 sāramati natuladhṛtisuvicāraṁbu
na nīti nakhilaśakunajñunu nācāramu naḍavasa vārāśivritāvanini divākarusari yoṇḍu nilan Ø 7 mitrutējuṇḍu divākararājunakuṁ bativratāṁbhōruha vāsanāṁbaragu prōlamakuṁ ja
maṁddāruṇḍu mēru ni ruṇḍu sittasaṁbhavākāruṇḍu sūrijanasahakāruṇḍu dēkanamādhavaṇḍunnatini Ø 8 samadārātinṛpāvanī-dharapavini śattrukṣamā
bhuvanīśamanassarō ṣṭaparapakṣakṣmāparājīmanaḥkumudārkkunu velanāṇṭigoṁkkavibhudikpūrnnapratāpō
vaṁkkajavananu ṇḍamātyapadavisthituṇḍai . 9 śrīmattarkkarasāṁbarēṁdu gaṇanaśrī
mātyamādha bhīmaśvarōdda
dīpavartti gappūravarttisēsi peṭṭiṁcce neṁttayu bhāsuramuga dēvabhaktuṇḍu dēkanamādhavaṇḍativicārasaṁpannu
lu naluvuruṁ būṇṭagāṁ dalarāsi pōtiyabōyini vasamunaṁ beṭṭina InupaEḍlu 50 ṇṭiki nityapaḍi golavaṁgala tribhuvanāṁkuśa nē
māna 1 likhitaṁ peddanācāryyēṇa .
Digital edition of SII 4.1169 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
